articles.title: OPENAI’S GPT STORE DELAYED TO NEXT YEAR
articles.summary: OpenAI’s GPT Store will be delayed until next year due to unexpected things keeping the company busy.

articles.title: AMAZON’S Q HAS HALLUCINATION ISSUES
articles.summary: Amazon's newly launched AI chatbot, Amazon Q, is reportedly facing issues with hallucinations and data leaks that include sensitive information about AWS data centers.

articles.title: INTERVIEW: SAM ALTMAN ON BEING FIRED AND REHIRED BY OPENAI
articles.summary: OpenAI's former CEO and co-founder, Sam Altman, has returned to the company after a boardroom coup. In a recent interview, Altman refrained from discussing the reasons behind his dismissal but shared his feelings of defiance and eventual acceptance of his return. OpenAI's biggest investor, Microsoft, is also planning to take a non-voting board seat.

articles.title: DIFFUSION MODELS WITHOUT ATTENTION
articles.summary: Most, but not all, modern diffusion models use the attention mechanism. The recent wave of interest in state spaces has made its way to diffusion, giving theoretical speed ups and opening up interesting applications.

articles.title: MOMASK TEXT TO ANIMATION
articles.summary: The authors of foundational work in this space have a new project that uses novel encoder methods to give fine-grained control of the final animation generation.

articles.title: PERSONALIZED IMAGE GENERATION WITH STYLEGAN EMBEDDINGS
articles.summary: A new method harnesses the extended StyleGAN embedding space W+ for text-to-image diffusion models, improving identity preservation in generated images.

articles.title: INITIALIZE A SMALL MODEL FROM A BIG ONE
articles.summary: Lots of work has been done in distillation and initialization such as the lottery ticket hypothesis. This work gives a simple mechanism to take a much larger model and initialize a smaller one from it. It dramatically improves smaller model performance.

articles.title: VIDEO PANOPTIC SEGMENTATION
articles.summary: MaXTron is a simple yet effective unified meta-architecture for video segmentation.

articles.title: A NEW FUSION FRAMEWORK FOR PATTERN RECOGNITION
articles.summary: This project introduces SAFE, a framework that combines RGB frames, event streams, and semantic labels using pre-trained vision and language models.

articles.title: STABILITY AI POSITIONING ITSELF FOR ACQUISITION
articles.summary: Stability AI has engaged in preliminary discussions with multiple companies for an acquisition due to mounting pressure from investors over its financial position.

articles.title: THE FUTURE OF AI IN SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT WITH INBAL SHANI (50 MINUTE PODCAST)
articles.summary: GitHub's Chief Product Officer, Inbal Shani, discusses AI's role in software development, arguing AI-driven code generation won't replace developers but instead enhance their efficiency. She explores the success metrics and philosophy behind GitHub’s Copilot and how the company fosters innovation. This conversation sheds light on AI's future in the tech industry.

articles.title: OPENAI & GRAND STRATEGY
articles.summary: This article emphasizes the role of grand strategy in tech, comparing modern tech leaders' ambitious achievements to historical conquests and urging them to think and act like historical figures in aligning aspirations with capabilities. It highlights recent events at OpenAI as an example of effective grand strategy and encourages aspiring leaders to craft strategies that align their capabilities with their ambitions for impactful, positive change.

articles.title: GOOGLE DELAYS GEMINI LAUNCH UNTIL JANUARY
articles.summary: Google has postponed the launch of Gemini, its next-generation foundation model from next week to January due to the AI's inconsistent handling of non-English queries.

articles.title: THE GPT TO RULE THEM ALL
articles.summary: The US government and Intel have started training a one trillion parameter model called ScienceGPT.

articles.title: AIPDF (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Use aiPDF to summarize, get insights from, and chat with any file.
